message:
Command `# Let's run librelane with verbose output to understand where 8afc8346 comes from
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v3 \
    --from OpenROAD.RepairDesignPostGPL \
    config.json 2>&1 | grep -E "8afc8346|version|PDK|resolv" | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Let's run librelane with verbose output to understand where 8afc8346 comes from
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v3 \
    --from OpenROAD.RepairDesignPostGPL \
    config.json 2>&1 | grep -E "8afc8346|version|PDK|resolv" | head -20
